## Summary

Describe the change and why it improves the project.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `python scripts/check_links.py`
- [ ] I ran `mkdocs build --strict`
- [ ] I updated `mkdocs.yml` if I added, removed, or renamed docs pages
- [ ] I kept filenames in lowercase kebab-case
- [ ] I followed the chapter template if this PR adds or edits a case study
- [ ] I added or updated sources where factual claims were introduced
- [ ] I included editable diagram sources if I added diagrams

## Notes for reviewers

Call out anything that deserves special attention, such as open questions, inferred content, or follow-up work.
